claims.headline: Eases stress
claims.notesSentence: Oral GABA reduced stress markers and increased relaxation-associated EEG patterns in healthy adults.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: GABA stress and EEG study on PubMed

claims.headline: Improves sleep onset
claims.notesSentence: A randomized double-blind trial reported reduced sleep-onset latency in adults with insomnia symptoms.
